instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: The school talent show
task.initialEmail: Hi,||The school talent show is next month, and I’m thinking of taking part. [1]Do you think I should sing or play the piano?[/1]||[2]Would you like to perform with me?[/2] It might be less scary together.||[3]When should we practise?[/3]||[4]Can you help me choose a song?[/4]||Thanks||Amelia

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Amelia,||Thanks for writing. [1]I think you should play the piano because you practise a lot and you sound really good when you play.[/1]||[2]Yes, I’d like to perform with you. I’m nervous too, but it will be more fun if we do it together.[/2]||[3]We could practise on Tuesday and Thursday after school in the music room, if the teacher says it is free.[/3]||[4]I agree that I can help you choose a song. We should pick something cheerful and not too difficult.[/4]||See you tomorrow,||Kate
